tools.name: projects.servicedirectoryProjectsLocationsList

tools.description: Creates a service, and returns the new service.

tools.description: Creates an endpoint, and returns the new endpoint.

tools.description: Gets the IAM Policy for a resource (namespace or service only).

tools.description: Lists all services belonging to a namespace.
